pattern_detection_summary.trigger: Terminal connection failure after instance creation - ID propagation disconnect
pattern_detection_summary.task_type: React State Management Anti-Pattern Analysis (High Complexity)
pattern_detection_summary.failure_mode: State synchronization failure in component communication chain
pattern_detection_summary.tdd_factor: No TDD patterns detected in current state management implementation

detected_anti_patterns.description: Async state update race condition between instance creation and terminal connection
detected_anti_patterns.root_cause: setSelectedInstance and connectSSE are called without proper state synchronization
detected_anti_patterns.impact: Terminal connects to stale instance ID instead of newly created instance

detected_anti_patterns.description: useEffect hook with missing dependency array causing stale closure
detected_anti_patterns.root_cause: setupEventHandlers and cleanupEventHandlers depend on state not in dependency array
detected_anti_patterns.impact: Event handlers may reference stale state values

detected_anti_patterns.description: Instance selection state not propagated to terminal connection
detected_anti_patterns.root_cause: selectedInstance state change doesn't trigger useEffect for connection update
detected_anti_patterns.impact: Clicking different instances doesn't update terminal connection target

detected_anti_patterns.description: Connection state management doesn't sync with React component lifecycle
detected_anti_patterns.root_cause: useRef connectionState bypasses React's state management system
detected_anti_patterns.impact: Connection target updates don't trigger component re-renders

state_synchronization_gaps.description: Instance creation success doesn't wait for state update before connecting terminal
state_synchronization_gaps.affected_flow: Create Instance → Set Selected → Connect Terminal
state_synchronization_gaps.timing_issue: connectSSE called before setSelectedInstance state has propagated

state_synchronization_gaps.description: Instance selection UI doesn't update active terminal connection
state_synchronization_gaps.affected_flow: Click Instance → Set Selected → Update Terminal Target
state_synchronization_gaps.timing_issue: No useEffect listening to selectedInstance changes for connection updates

component_communication_failures.description: ClaudeInstanceManager doesn't communicate instance changes to terminal components
component_communication_failures.missing_pattern: Instance state change callback to terminal connection hook

component_communication_failures.description: useHTTPSSE hook state not synchronized with component state
component_communication_failures.missing_pattern: Hook state updates don't trigger component re-renders for connection status

real_time_monitoring_requirements.target: Instance creation to terminal connection timing
real_time_monitoring_requirements.detection_method: Performance.now() timestamps at each state change

recommended_fixes.description: Use useEffect to sync selectedInstance changes with terminal connection
Replace connectionState useRef with useState for proper React lifecycle
Add instance change callbacks between parent and child components
recommended_fixes.implementation: Pass onInstanceChange callback from parent to terminal components

recommended_fixes.description: Add test coverage for state synchronization scenarios
recommended_fixes.implementation: Test suite for instance creation → terminal connection flow

detection_rules.pattern: setState.*immediately followed by.*async call using same state
useEffect.*dependencies missing.*state variables used in effect
useRef.*for state that should trigger re-renders

failure_patterns.pattern: setState + immediate async call without waiting for state update
